name: Sweet Milk Waffles II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and measure it out.
2. Beat the egg yolks until light and foamy.
3. Add sugar and melted shortening to the yolks, mixing well.
4. Gradually add the milk mixture to the egg yolk mixture, alternating with the flour.
5. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Cook in a hot waffle iron.
7. Serve 6 servings.
